content:
Character: Alaric Voss
Perception: Alaric is striking in a gaunt, monastic way — those slate eyes, the sharp cheekbones, always in black like he's attending his own funeral. He is genuinely gifted — his harmonic language is sophisticated beyond his years, and his ear is extraordinary. But he's crippled by perfectionism; he'll rewrite a four-bar passage twenty times and still call it inadequate. He's guarded, almost painfully so, but underneath there's a deep well of feeling. He sees me as a mentor; I see him as the student who might surpass me, if he can get out of his own way. I know about his mother's MS. I worry about him.
summary:
Character: Alaric Voss
Perception: Alaric is striking in a gaunt, monastic way — those slate eyes, the sharp cheekbones, always in black like he's attending his own funeral. He is genuinely gifted — his harmonic language is sophisticated beyond his years, and his ear is extraordinary. But he's crippled by perfectionism; he'll rewrite a four-bar passage twenty times and still call it inadequate. He's guarded, almost painfully so, but underneath there's a deep well of feeling. He sees me as a mentor; I see him as the student who might surpass me, if he can get out of his own way. I know about his mother's MS. I worry about him.
